---
title: "Giulia Proteomics"
---

Bulk microglia proteomics analysis of mouse brain samples from the Destrooper lab. Data was acquired by DIA mass spectrometry and processed with Spectronaut, then analysed in R.

## Study design

Four genotypes, 4 animals each (n=16 total):

| Group | Samples | Microglia |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| hApp | GA_1–4 | Yes |
| hAppNLGF | GA_5–8 | Yes |
| hAppNLGF_FIRE | GA_9–12 | No (FIRE KO) |
| hApp_FIRE | GA_13–16 | No (FIRE KO) |


## Analysis

### Bulk proteomics

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [1. Initial QC](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/01_initial_qc_spectronaut.qmd) | Protein counts, MAD outlier detection, PCA, correlation heatmap, contaminant check |
| [2. MSstats](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/02_msstats.qmd) | Differential abundance — pairwise contrasts plus the APP × Microglia interaction contrast |
| [3. DE Plots](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/03_DE_plots.qmd) | Volcano plots and visualisation of differentially abundant proteins |
| [4. GSEA](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/04_gsea.qmd) | Gene set enrichment analysis using GO, KEGG, and cell-type signatures (C8) |
| [5. Microglia × APP-NLGF](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/05_microglia_app_modulated.qmd) | Microglia-attributable proteins further modulated by APP-NLGF — interaction hits, UpSet, heatmap |
| [6. PPI Networks](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/06_PPI.qmd) | STRINGdb interaction networks and hub proteins per contrast |
| [7. Subcellular Stratification](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/07_subcellular.qmd) | UniProt subcellular-location and secretome stratification of significant hits |
| [8. Protein Profile Plots](bulk_proteomics/notebooks/08_protein_profileplots.qmd) | Per-protein profile plots across genotypes for selected hits |

### Phosphoproteomics

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [1. Phospho QC](phosphoproteomics/notebooks/01_phospho_qc.qmd) | Phosphopeptide / phosphosite counts, MAD outliers, PCA, sample correlation |
| [2. MSstatsPTM](phosphoproteomics/notebooks/02_msstatsptm.qmd) | Phospho DE adjusted for protein-level abundance — 4 pairwise + APP × Microglia interaction |
| [3. Phospho DE Plots](phosphoproteomics/notebooks/03_phospho_DE_plots.qmd) | Volcano plots of adjusted phospho contrasts, plus phospho-vs-protein concordance scatter |
| [4. Kinase Activity](phosphoproteomics/notebooks/04_kinase_activity.qmd) | Inferred kinase activities per contrast via decoupleR + OmniPath kinase–substrate network |
| [5. Phospho GSEA](phosphoproteomics/notebooks/05_phospho_GSEA.qmd) | Pathway enrichment over GO/KEGG/C8 using gene-level rolled-up phospho ranks |
| [6. Phospho Profile Plots](phosphoproteomics/notebooks/06_phospho_profileplots.qmd) | Per-phosphosite profile plots across genotypes for selected hits |
